Q112.question: Now I'd like you to tell me your views on corruption – when people pay a bribe, give a gift or do a favor to other people in order to get the things they need done or the services they need. How would you place your views on corruption in your country on a 10-point scale where “1” means “there is no corruption in this country” and “10” means “there is abundant corruption in this country”. If your views are somewhat mixed, choose the appropriate number in between.

responses.10: 10 - There is abundant corruption in this country
responses.1: 1 - There is no corruption in this country

Q281.question: To which of the following occupational groups do you belong?

responses.1: Professional and technical (for example: doctor, teacher, engineer, artist, accountant, nurse)
responses.2: Higher administrative (for example: banker, executive in big business, high government official, union official)
responses.3: Clerical (for example: secretary, clerk, office manager, civil servant, bookkeeper)
responses.4: Sales (for example: sales manager, shop owner, shop assistant, insurance agent, buyer)
responses.5: Service (for example: restaurant owner, police officer, waitress, barber, caretaker)
responses.6: Skilled worker (for example: foreman, motor mechanic, printer, seamstress, tool and die maker, electrician)
responses.7: Semi-skilled worker (for example: bricklayer, bus driver, cannery worker, carpenter, sheet metal worker, baker)
responses.8: Unskilled worker (for example: labourer, porter, unskilled factory worker, cleaner)
responses.9: Farm worker (for example: farm labourer, tractor driver)
